message:
feat: add fullscreen expand button to markdown preview (#3750) (#3751)

Add an expand button in the preview tab header that opens the markdown
content in a fullscreen overlay. The overlay reuses the same
ReactMarkdown renderer and styles, supports closing via the X button,
Escape key, or clicking outside, and is fully keyboard accessible.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

preview: string }[]>([]) const [isDragOver, setIsDragOver] = useState(false) const [copiedIndex, setCopiedIndex] = useState(null) + const [isPreviewFullscreen, setIsPreviewFullscreen] = useState(false) const screenshotInputRef = useRef(null) + const fullscreenOverlayRef = useRef(null) + + // Close fullscreen preview on Escape key + const handleFullscreenKeyDown = useCallback((e: KeyboardEvent) => { + if (e.key === 'Escape') { + setIsPreviewFullscreen(false) + } + }, []) + + useEffect(() => { + if (isPreviewFullscreen) { + document.addEventListener('keydown', handleFullscreenKeyDown) + return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleFullscreenKeyDown) + } + }, [isPreviewFullscreen, handleFullscreenKeyDown]) const handleScreenshotFiles = (files: FileList | null) => { if (!files) return @@ -1345,6 +1361,17 @@ export function FeatureRequestModal({ isOpen, onClose, initialTab, initialReques Preview + {descriptionTab === 'preview' && description.trim() && ( + + )} {descriptionTab === 'write' ?
